title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Beast Pirates, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Zoro as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're on vacation here, I would advise you to leave.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The members of the worst generation are facing off...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you know who actually controls this country....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I came here to kick that Emperor's ass!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: kin'emon told us not to say that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was lying!! I actually don't know, either!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: THE PROBABABABILITY OF YOU BEING ALIVE...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By the way, where did you get that sword?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's supposed to be a world- renowned sword, right-gozaru?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, I'm serious. It really does have the aura of a world-renowned sword. Let me hold it for a second...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: COME AT ME, YOU BASTAAA AARDS!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, I just wanna borrow it for a bit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nah, it'll be fine. I'm gonna cut them-gozaru!! GOMU GOMU NO...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You just used your pistol punch!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even that lizard is trying to bite me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...It was my fault that the lizard got....!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 36 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
